; Alessio Faraci (https://github.com/alefaraci)
; On-canvas Dictionary + Wikipedia + Translator for a lasso-selected PDF/EPUB word.
; Offline dictionary (up to 3 of 12 languages, downloaded from Settings) + online Wikipedia summary + online Translator.
; Dictionary data & Wikipedia text: Wiktionary / Wikipedia via kaikki.org / Wiktextract (CC-BY-SA); translations by DeepL / MyMemory.
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-07-13
;
; Requires: https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions (qt-resource-rebuilder + qt-command-executor)

; ============================================================================================================
; 1) Native glyph-selection menu: Copy -> icon-only, tighter gap, add a "Dictionary" button + a dictLookup signal.
; ============================================================================================================
AFFECT [[2170432337220872387]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			signal dictLookup(~&7083178290016&~ word)
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[14028859585806021198]]
		REPLACE [[6504315758]] WITH {
			~&6504315758&~: ""
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233132260]]
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL
		INSERT {
			~&197086177&~: ~&7082020628281&~.~&3842193742606557678&~ * 0.63
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[10742505294233132260]]
		LOCATE AFTER [[425121728314878811.16765000136167945189.7081261925573]]#[[14028859585806021198]]
		INSERT {
			~&425121728314878811&~.~&16765000136167945189&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
				~&5972374&~: glyphDictionaryButton
				~&481641799955318521&~: ~&5971598&~.~&233696851602406&~
				~&6504337259&~: ~&10742505294233132260&~.~&6504337259&~
				~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"7424607448732512620&~
				~&254542236275632405&~: {
					~&6504254477&~.dictLookup(~&6504254477&~.~&16536305558369206583&~);
					~&6504254477&~.~&214622501183&~();
				}
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; ============================================================================================================
; 2) DeviceSceneView: enable glyph selection, receive the signal, do the lookup, host the definition panel.
; ============================================================================================================
AFFECT [[11806562588218124596]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[1515638797115235411]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			onDictLookup: ~&6504254477&~.dictOpen(word)
		}
	END TRAVERSE
	TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
		LOCATE AFTER ALL
		INSERT {
			property ~&7083178290016&~ dictWord: ""
			property ~&7083178290016&~ dictPron: ""
			property ~&197102514&~ dictResults: ({})
			property ~&197102514&~ dictLangs: ["en", ~&"5972390&~]
			property ~&7083178290016&~ dictActiveLang: "en"
			property ~&197102514&~ dictModel: []
			property ~&7083178290016&~ dictTab: "dict"
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictTransService: "mymemory"
			property ~&7083178290016&~ dictWikiText: ""
			property ~&7083178290016&~ dictWikiStatus: ""
			property ~&197088788&~ dictWikiToken: 0
			property ~&197102514&~ dictWikiReq: ~&6504117156&~
			property ~&197102514&~ dictWikiOptions: []
			property ~&7083178290016&~ dictWikiTitle: ""
			property ~&6503679477&~ dictShown: ~&214625660372&~
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictRaw: ""
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictSrcLang: ~&"6503650242&~
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictTgtLang: "IT"
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictTransText: ""
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictTransStatus: ""
				property ~&197088788&~ dictTransToken: 0
				property ~&197102514&~ dictTransReq: ~&6504117156&~
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictDeeplKey: ""
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictTransDetected: ""
				property ~&7083178290016&~ dictPicker: ""

			~&214604601930&~ {
				~&233743626668842&~: ~&6504329801&~
				~&7713147298280334&~: 250
				~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
				~&495358363329399331&~: {
					~&5972376&~ (!~&14240654930781121335&~.~&1515638797115235411&~.~&233726547792244&~) {
						~&14240654930781121335&~.~&1515638797115235411&~.~&233726547792244&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
					}
				}
			}
			~&214604601930&~ {
				~&5972374&~: dictWikiTimer
				~&7713147298280334&~: 10000
				~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
				~&495358363329399331&~: {
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus === "loading") {
						~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
					}
				}
			}

			~&214604601930&~ {
					~&5972374&~: dictTransTimer
					~&7713147298280334&~: 10000
					~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
					~&495358363329399331&~: {
						~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus === "loading") {
							~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
						}
					}
				}
				function dictLoadTransConfig() {
					~&6504254477&~.dictTransService = "mymemory";
					~&6504254477&~.dictDeeplKey = "";
					try {
						~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
						req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/.config/dictionary-wiki-translator.json", ~&214625660372&~);
						req.~&6504279475&~();
						~&5972376&~ (req.responseText && req.responseText.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
							~&197102514&~ ~&180984&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
							~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~ && ~&180984&~.translateService === "deepl") {
								~&6504254477&~.dictTransService = "deepl";
							}
							~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~ && ~&180984&~.deeplKey) {
								~&6504254477&~.dictDeeplKey = ("" + ~&180984&~.deeplKey).~&6504329413&~();
							}
							~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~ && ~&180984&~.dictLangs && ~&180984&~.dictLangs.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
								~&6504254477&~.dictLangs = ~&180984&~.dictLangs;
							}
						}
					} catch (~&180974&~) {
					}
				}
				function dictLangTable() {
					~&7083121450889&~ [
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "English",    "mm": "en", "dlSrc": "EN", "dlTgt": "EN-US" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Italian",    "mm": ~&"5972390&~, "dlSrc": "IT", "dlTgt": "IT" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "French",     "mm": "fr", "dlSrc": "FR", "dlTgt": "FR" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "German",     "mm": "de", "dlSrc": "DE", "dlTgt": "DE" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Spanish",    "mm": "es", "dlSrc": "ES", "dlTgt": "ES" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Portuguese", "mm": ~&"5972621&~, "dlSrc": "PT", "dlTgt": "PT-PT" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Dutch",      "mm": "nl", "dlSrc": "NL", "dlTgt": "NL" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Polish",     "mm": "pl", "dlSrc": "PL", "dlTgt": "PL" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Russian",    "mm": "ru", "dlSrc": "RU", "dlTgt": "RU" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Turkish",    "mm": "tr", "dlSrc": "TR", "dlTgt": "TR" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Ukrainian",  "mm": "uk", "dlSrc": "UK", "dlTgt": "UK" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Greek",      "mm": "el", "dlSrc": "EL", "dlTgt": "EL" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Czech",      "mm": "cs", "dlSrc": "CS", "dlTgt": "CS" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Danish",     "mm": "da", "dlSrc": "DA", "dlTgt": "DA" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Finnish",    "mm": "fi", "dlSrc": "FI", "dlTgt": "FI" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Swedish",    "mm": "sv", "dlSrc": "SV", "dlTgt": "SV" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Norwegian",  "mm": ~&"5972550&~, "dlSrc": "NB", "dlTgt": "NB" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Romanian",   "mm": "ro", "dlSrc": "RO", "dlTgt": "RO" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Hungarian",  "mm": "hu", "dlSrc": "HU", "dlTgt": "HU" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Bulgarian",  "mm": ~&"5972146&~, "dlSrc": "BG", "dlTgt": "BG" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Slovak",     "mm": "sk", "dlSrc": "SK", "dlTgt": "SK" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Slovenian",  "mm": "sl", "dlSrc": "SL", "dlTgt": "SL" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Estonian",   "mm": "et", "dlSrc": "ET", "dlTgt": "ET" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Latvian",    "mm": "lv", "dlSrc": "LV", "dlTgt": "LV" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Lithuanian", "mm": "lt", "dlSrc": "LT", "dlTgt": "LT" },
						{ ~&"6504095402&~: "Indonesian", "mm": ~&"5972374&~, "dlSrc": "ID", "dlTgt": "ID" }
					];
				}
				function dictLangByTgt(~&6503715044&~) {
					~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = dictLangTable();
					~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&180989&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
						~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~[~&180978&~].dlTgt === ~&6503715044&~) {
							~&7083121450889&~ ~&180989&~[~&180978&~];
						}
					}
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&180989&~[1];
				}
				function dictLangBySrcDl(~&6503715044&~) {
					~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = dictLangTable();
					~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&180989&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
						~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~[~&180978&~].dlSrc === ~&6503715044&~) {
							~&7083121450889&~ ~&180989&~[~&180978&~];
						}
					}
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
				}
				function dictLangByDetected(~&6503715044&~) {
					~&197102514&~ ~&6503664356&~ = ("" + ~&6503715044&~).~&503051308629934673&~().~&254548200562243306&~(0, 2);
					~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = dictLangTable();
					~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&180989&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
						~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~[~&180978&~].mm.~&254548200562243306&~(0, 2) === ~&6503664356&~) {
							~&7083121450889&~ ~&180989&~[~&180978&~];
						}
					}
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
				}
				function dictSrcMm() {
					~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = dictLangBySrcDl(~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang);
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&180988&~ ? ~&180988&~.mm : "Autodetect";
				}
				function dictSrcLabel() {
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang === ~&"6503650242&~) {
						~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictTransDetected.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
							~&197102514&~ ~&180973&~ = dictLangByDetected(~&6504254477&~.dictTransDetected);
							~&5972376&~ (~&180973&~) {
								~&7083121450889&~ ~&180973&~.~&6504095402&~;
							}
						}
						~&7083121450889&~ "Auto-detect";
					}
					~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = dictLangBySrcDl(~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang);
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&180988&~ ? ~&180988&~.~&6504095402&~ : "Auto-detect";
				}
				function dictTgtLabel() {
					~&7083121450889&~ dictLangByTgt(~&6504254477&~.dictTgtLang).~&6504095402&~;
				}
				function dictTranslate() {
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictRaw.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
						~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = "empty";
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictTransReq) {
						try {
							~&6504254477&~.dictTransReq.abort();
						} catch (~&180974&~) {
						}
					}
					~&6504254477&~.dictTransToken = ~&6504254477&~.dictTransToken + 1;
					~&197102514&~ myToken = ~&6504254477&~.dictTransToken;
					~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = "loading";
					~&6504254477&~.dictTransText = "";
					dictFlick.~&7712892661591613&~ = 0;
					dictTransTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictTransService === "deepl") {
						dictTranslateDeepl(myToken);
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&197102514&~ ~&197099793&~ = (~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang === ~&"6503650242&~) ? "Autodetect" : dictSrcMm();
					~&197102514&~ tgt = dictLangByTgt(~&6504254477&~.dictTgtLang).mm;
					~&197102514&~ ~&197101980&~ = "https://api.mymemory.translated.net/get?q=" + encodeURIComponent(~&6504254477&~.dictRaw) + "&langpair=" + ~&197099793&~ + "|" + tgt;
					~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
					~&6504254477&~.dictTransReq = req;
					req.onreadystatechange = function() {
						~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
							~&7083121450889&~;
						}
						~&5972376&~ (myToken !== ~&6504254477&~.dictTransToken) {
							~&7083121450889&~;
						}
						dictTransTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 200) {
							try {
								~&197102514&~ ~&180984&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
								~&197102514&~ rd = ~&180984&~.responseData;
								~&5972376&~ (rd && rd.translatedText && rd.translatedText.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
									~&6504254477&~.dictTransText = rd.translatedText;
									~&5972376&~ (rd.detectedLanguage) {
										~&6504254477&~.dictTransDetected = rd.detectedLanguage;
									}
									~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = (~&180984&~.quotaFinished === ~&6504329801&~) ? "quota" : ~&"5972579&~;
									~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang === ~&"6503650242&~) {
										dictAutoFlipTarget();
									}
								} ~&6503784146&~ {
									~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
								}
							} catch (~&180974&~) {
								~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
							}
						} ~&6503784146&~ {
							~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
						}
					};
					try {
						req.~&6504147419&~("GET", ~&197101980&~);
						req.~&6504279475&~();
					} catch (~&180974&~) {
						dictTransTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
					}
				}
				function dictTranslateDeepl(myToken) {
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictDeeplKey.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
						dictTransTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = "nokey";
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&197102514&~ free = (~&6504254477&~.dictDeeplKey.~&214641468857&~(-3) === ":fx");
					~&197102514&~ host = free ? "https://api-free.deepl.com/v2/translate" : "https://api.deepl.com/v2/translate";
					~&197102514&~ tgt = ~&6504254477&~.dictTgtLang;
					~&197102514&~ ~&6503679127&~ = "text=" + encodeURIComponent(~&6504254477&~.dictRaw) + "&target_lang=" + tgt;
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang !== ~&"6503650242&~) {
						~&6503679127&~ = ~&6503679127&~ + "&source_lang=" + ~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang;
					}
					~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
					~&6504254477&~.dictTransReq = req;
					req.onreadystatechange = function() {
						~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
							~&7083121450889&~;
						}
						~&5972376&~ (myToken !== ~&6504254477&~.dictTransToken) {
							~&7083121450889&~;
						}
						dictTransTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 200) {
							try {
								~&197102514&~ ~&180984&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
								~&197102514&~ tr = (~&180984&~.~&16606260994467056203&~ && ~&180984&~.~&16606260994467056203&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) ? ~&180984&~.~&16606260994467056203&~[0] : ~&6504117156&~;
								~&5972376&~ (tr && tr.~&6504315758&~ && tr.~&6504315758&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
									~&6504254477&~.dictTransText = tr.~&6504315758&~;
									~&5972376&~ (tr.detected_source_language) {
										~&6504254477&~.dictTransDetected = tr.detected_source_language;
									}
									~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"5972579&~;
									~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang === ~&"6503650242&~) {
										dictAutoFlipTarget();
									}
								} ~&6503784146&~ {
									~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
								}
							} catch (~&180974&~) {
								~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
							}
						} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 403) {
							~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = "badkey";
						} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 456) {
							~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = "quota";
						} ~&6503784146&~ {
							~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
						}
					};
					try {
						req.~&6504147419&~("POST", host);
						req.setRequestHeader("Authorization", "DeepL-Auth-Key " + ~&6504254477&~.dictDeeplKey);
						req.setRequestHeader("Content-Type", "application/x-www-form-urlencoded");
						req.~&6504279475&~(~&6503679127&~);
					} catch (~&180974&~) {
						dictTransTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
					}
				}
				function dictOpenPicker(which) {
					~&6504254477&~.dictPicker = (~&6504254477&~.dictPicker === which) ? "" : which;
				}
				function dictPickLang(~&214624950331&~) {
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictPicker === ~&"197099793&~) {
						~&6504254477&~.dictSrcLang = (~&214624950331&~ === ~&6504117156&~) ? ~&"6503650242&~ : ~&214624950331&~.dlSrc;
					} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictPicker === "tgt") {
						~&6504254477&~.dictTgtLang = ~&214624950331&~.dlTgt;
					}
					~&6504254477&~.dictPicker = "";
					dictTranslate();
				}
				function dictAutoFlipTarget() {
					~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictTransDetected.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&197102514&~ ~&180973&~ = dictLangByDetected(~&6504254477&~.dictTransDetected);
					~&5972376&~ (!~&180973&~) {
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&5972376&~ (~&180973&~.dlTgt === ~&6504254477&~.dictTgtLang) {
						~&6504254477&~.dictTgtLang = (~&6504254477&~.dictTgtLang === "IT") ? "EN-US" : "IT";
						dictTranslate();
					}
				}
				function dictWordCount(~&180988&~) {
					~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = "" + ~&180988&~;
					~&197102514&~ n = 0;
					~&197102514&~ inWord = ~&214625660372&~;
					~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&180989&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
						~&197102514&~ ~&6503715044&~ = ~&180989&~.charCodeAt(~&180978&~);
						~&197102514&~ ws = (~&6503715044&~ === 32 || ~&6503715044&~ === 9 || ~&6503715044&~ === 10 || ~&6503715044&~ === 13);
						~&5972376&~ (!ws && !inWord) {
							n++;
							inWord = ~&6504329801&~;
						} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (ws) {
							inWord = ~&214625660372&~;
						}
					}
					~&7083121450889&~ n;
				}
				function dictBucket(~&197090674&~) {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180977&~ = 5381;
				~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&197090674&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
					~&180977&~ = (~&180977&~ * 33 + ~&197090674&~.charCodeAt(~&180978&~)) % 4294967296;
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&180977&~ % 2048;
			}
			function dictStrip(~&180992&~) {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = ("" + ~&180992&~).~&6504329413&~();
				~&197102514&~ q = String.fromCharCode(34);
				~&197102514&~ ap = String.fromCharCode(39);
				~&197102514&~ punct = ".,;:!?()[]{}" + q + ap + String.fromCharCode(0x2026) + String.fromCharCode(0x2014) + String.fromCharCode(0x2013) + String.fromCharCode(0x00AB) + String.fromCharCode(0x00BB) + String.fromCharCode(0x201~&180940&~) + String.fromCharCode(0x201D) + String.fromCharCode(0x2018) + String.fromCharCode(0x2019);
				~&197102514&~ ~&180970&~ = 0;
				~&197102514&~ ~&180971&~ = ~&180988&~.~&7082886407723&~;
				~&214646069090&~ (~&180970&~ < ~&180971&~ && punct.~&233731717342038&~(~&180988&~.~&7082537290076&~(~&180970&~)) >= 0) {
					~&180970&~++;
				}
				~&214646069090&~ (~&180971&~ > ~&180970&~ && punct.~&233731717342038&~(~&180988&~.~&7082537290076&~(~&180971&~ - 1)) >= 0) {
					~&180971&~--;
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&180988&~.~&254548200562243306&~(~&180970&~, ~&180971&~);
			}
			function dictReadJson(~&6504167510&~) {
				try {
					~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
					req.~&6504147419&~("GET", ~&"233727656679905&~ + ~&6504167510&~, ~&214625660372&~);
					req.~&6504279475&~();
					~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = req.responseText;
					~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~ && ~&180989&~.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
						~&7083121450889&~ ~&6502785411&~.parse(~&180989&~);
					}
				} catch (~&180974&~) {
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
			}
			function dictLookupLang(~&6503715044&~, word) {
				~&197102514&~ ~&197090674&~ = ("" + word).~&6504329413&~().~&503051308629934673&~();
				~&5972376&~ (~&197090674&~.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
				}
				~&197102514&~ dir = "/home/root/dictionary/" + ~&6503715044&~ + ~&"180920&~;
				~&197102514&~ ~&180971&~ = dictBucket(~&197090674&~);
				~&197102514&~ shard = dictReadJson(dir + "shard_" + ~&180971&~ + ".json");
				~&5972376&~ (shard && shard[~&197090674&~]) {
					~&7083121450889&~ { rec: shard[~&197090674&~], via: "" };
				}
				~&197102514&~ lem = dictReadJson(dir + "lemma_" + ~&180971&~ + ".json");
				~&5972376&~ (lem && lem[~&197090674&~]) {
					~&197102514&~ ~&6503664356&~ = lem[~&197090674&~];
					~&197102514&~ bb = dictBucket(~&6503664356&~);
					~&197102514&~ bshard = (bb === ~&180971&~ && shard) ? shard : dictReadJson(dir + "shard_" + bb + ".json");
					~&5972376&~ (bshard && bshard[~&6503664356&~]) {
						~&7083121450889&~ { rec: bshard[~&6503664356&~], via: ~&197090674&~ };
					}
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~;
			}
			function dictCap(~&180988&~) {
				~&5972376&~ (!~&180988&~ || ~&180988&~.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
					~&7083121450889&~ ~&180988&~;
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&180988&~.~&7082537290076&~(0).toUpperCase() + ~&180988&~.~&254548200562243306&~(1);
			}
			function dictPushLang(~&214634455770&~, res) {
				~&197102514&~ rec = res.rec;
				~&5972376&~ (res.via && res.via.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
					~&214634455770&~.~&6504189257&~({ kind: "via", ~&6504315758&~: res.via + " → " + rec.~&180992&~ });
				}
				~&197102514&~ np = rec.~&180985&~ ? rec.~&180985&~.~&7082886407723&~ : 0;
				~&197102514&~ seenPos = ~&214625660372&~;
				~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < np; ~&180978&~++) {
					~&197102514&~ blk = rec.~&180985&~[~&180978&~];
					~&197102514&~ ns = (blk && blk.~&180988&~) ? blk.~&180988&~.~&7082886407723&~ : 0;
					~&5972376&~ (ns === 0) {
						~&7712892661735406&~;
					}
					~&214634455770&~.~&6504189257&~({ kind: ~&"197096443&~, ~&6504315758&~: blk.~&197096443&~ ? blk.~&197096443&~ : "", ~&214625954417&~: !seenPos });
					seenPos = ~&6504329801&~;
					~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180979&~ = 0; ~&180979&~ < ns; ~&180979&~++) {
						~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = blk.~&180988&~[~&180979&~];
						~&214634455770&~.~&6504189257&~({ kind: "sense", n: (~&180979&~ + 1), g: dictCap(~&180988&~.g), ~&180993&~: ~&180988&~.~&180993&~ ? ~&180988&~.~&180993&~ : "" });
					}
				}
			}
			function dictActiveRes() {
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504254477&~.dictResults[~&6504254477&~.dictActiveLang];
			}
			function dictLangInfo() {
				~&7083121450889&~ [
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "en", ~&"6504095402&~: "English",    "native": "English" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: ~&"5972390&~, ~&"6504095402&~: "Italian",    "native": "Italiano" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "es", ~&"6504095402&~: "Spanish",    "native": "Español" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "fr", ~&"6504095402&~: "French",     "native": "Français" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: ~&"5972621&~, ~&"6504095402&~: "Portuguese", "native": "Português" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "nl", ~&"6504095402&~: "Dutch",      "native": "Nederlands" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "de", ~&"6504095402&~: "German",     "native": "Deutsch" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "pl", ~&"6504095402&~: "Polish",     "native": "Polski" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "ru", ~&"6504095402&~: "Russian",    "native": "Русский" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "el", ~&"6504095402&~: "Greek",      "native": "Ελληνικά" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "cs", ~&"6504095402&~: "Czech",      "native": "Čeština" },
						{ ~&"6503715044&~: "tr", ~&"6504095402&~: "Turkish",    "native": "Türkçe" }
				];
			}
			function dictLangNative(~&6503715044&~) {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = dictLangInfo();
				~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&180989&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
					~&5972376&~ (~&180989&~[~&180978&~].~&6503715044&~ === ~&6503715044&~) {
						~&7083121450889&~ ~&180989&~[~&180978&~].native;
					}
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&6503715044&~;
			}
			function dictBuildModel() {
				~&197102514&~ ~&214634455770&~ = [];
				~&197102514&~ res = dictActiveRes();
				~&5972376&~ (res) {
					dictPushLang(~&214634455770&~, res);
				}
				~&5972376&~ (~&214634455770&~.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
					~&214634455770&~.~&6504189257&~({ kind: ~&"6504110681&~, ~&6504315758&~: "No definition found." });
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&214634455770&~;
			}
			function dictRefresh() {
				~&197102514&~ res = dictActiveRes();
				~&197102514&~ pr = "";
				~&5972376&~ (res && res.rec) {
					pr = res.rec.pr ? res.rec.pr : (res.rec.ipa ? res.rec.ipa : "");
				}
				~&6504254477&~.dictPron = pr;
				~&6504254477&~.dictModel = dictBuildModel();
				dictFlick.~&7712892661591613&~ = 0;
			}
			function dictSetLang(~&6503715044&~) {
				~&5972376&~ (!~&6504254477&~.dictResults[~&6503715044&~]) {
					~&7083121450889&~;
				}
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken = ~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken + 1;
				dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = "";
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiText = "";
				~&6504254477&~.dictActiveLang = ~&6503715044&~;
				~&6504254477&~.dictTab = "dict";
				dictRefresh();
			}
			function dictCleanWiki(ex) {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = "" + ex;
				~&197102514&~ nl = ~&180988&~.~&233731717342038&~(String.fromCharCode(10));
				~&5972376&~ (nl >= 0) {
					~&180988&~ = ~&180988&~.~&254548200562243306&~(0, nl);
				}
				~&197102514&~ last = -1;
				~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&180988&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
					~&197102514&~ ~&180972&~ = ~&180988&~.~&7082537290076&~(~&180978&~);
					~&5972376&~ (~&180972&~ === ~&"180919&~ || ~&180972&~ === "!" || ~&180972&~ === "?") {
						last = ~&180978&~;
					}
				}
				~&5972376&~ (last >= 0) {
					~&180988&~ = ~&180988&~.~&254548200562243306&~(0, last + 1);
				}
				~&7083121450889&~ ~&180988&~;
			}
			function dictFetchWiki(lang) {
				dictFetchWikiTitle(lang, ~&6504254477&~.dictWord);
			}
			function dictFetchWikiTitle(lang, ~&214642559243&~) {
				~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictWikiReq) {
					try {
						~&6504254477&~.dictWikiReq.abort();
					} catch (~&180974&~) {
					}
				}
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken = ~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken + 1;
				~&197102514&~ myToken = ~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken;
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = "loading";
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiText = "";
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiOptions = [];
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiTitle = ~&214642559243&~;
				dictFlick.~&7712892661591613&~ = 0;
				dictWikiTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
				~&197102514&~ ~&197101980&~ = "https://" + lang + ".wikipedia.org/api/rest_v1/page/summary/" + encodeURIComponent(~&214642559243&~);
				~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiReq = req;
				req.onreadystatechange = function() {
					~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&5972376&~ (myToken !== ~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken) {
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 200) {
						try {
							~&197102514&~ ~&180984&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
							~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~.~&6504337259&~ === "disambiguation") {
								~&197102514&~ canon = ~&180984&~.~&214642559243&~ ? ~&180984&~.~&214642559243&~ : ~&214642559243&~;
								~&6504254477&~.dictWikiTitle = canon;
								dictFetchWikiLinks(lang, canon, myToken);
								~&7083121450889&~;
							}
							dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
							~&197102514&~ ex = dictCleanWiki(~&180984&~.extract ? ~&180984&~.extract : "");
							~&5972376&~ (ex.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
								~&6504254477&~.dictWikiText = ex;
								~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"5972579&~;
							} ~&6503784146&~ {
								~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = "notfound";
							}
						} catch (~&180974&~) {
							dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
							~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
						}
					} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 404) {
						dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = "notfound";
					} ~&6503784146&~ {
						dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
						~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
					}
				};
				try {
					req.~&6504147419&~("GET", ~&197101980&~);
					req.setRequestHeader("Api-User-Agent", "rM-extensions-dictionary/1.0");
					req.~&6504279475&~();
				} catch (~&180974&~) {
					dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
					~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
				}
			}
			function dictFetchWikiLinks(lang, ~&214642559243&~, tok) {
				dictWikiTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
				~&197102514&~ ~&197101980&~ = "https://" + lang + ".wikipedia.org/w/api.php?action=query&format=json&prop=links&plnamespace=0&pllimit=100&titles=" + encodeURIComponent(~&214642559243&~);
				~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiReq = req;
				req.onreadystatechange = function() {
					~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					~&5972376&~ (tok !== ~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken) {
						~&7083121450889&~;
					}
					dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
					~&5972376&~ (req.~&7083177691309&~ === 200) {
						try {
							~&197102514&~ ~&180984&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
							~&197102514&~ opts = [];
							~&197102514&~ ~&214637513689&~ = ~&180984&~.query ? ~&180984&~.query.~&214637513689&~ : ~&6504117156&~;
							~&5972376&~ (~&214637513689&~) {
								~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ ~&5972384&~ ~&214637513689&~) {
									~&197102514&~ links = ~&214637513689&~[~&180980&~].links;
									~&5972376&~ (links) {
										~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < links.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
											opts.~&6504189257&~(links[~&180978&~].~&214642559243&~);
										}
									}
								}
							}
							~&5972376&~ (opts.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
								~&6504254477&~.dictWikiOptions = opts;
								~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = "disambig";
							} ~&6503784146&~ {
								~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = "notfound";
							}
						} catch (~&180974&~) {
							~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
						}
					} ~&6503784146&~ {
						~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
					}
				};
				try {
					req.~&6504147419&~("GET", ~&197101980&~);
					req.setRequestHeader("Api-User-Agent", "rM-extensions-dictionary/1.0");
					req.~&6504279475&~();
				} catch (~&180974&~) {
					dictWikiTimer.~&6504295855&~();
					~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = ~&"214625091795&~;
				}
			}
			function dictWikiPick(~&214642559243&~) {
				dictFetchWikiTitle(~&6504254477&~.dictActiveLang, ~&214642559243&~);
			}
			function dictOpenWiki() {
				~&6504254477&~.dictTab = "wiki";
				dictFetchWiki(~&6504254477&~.dictActiveLang);
			}
			function dictOpenTranslate() {
					dictLoadTransConfig();
					~&6504254477&~.dictTransDetected = "";
					~&6504254477&~.dictTab = "translate";
					dictTranslate();
				}
				function dictOpen(word) {
				~&197102514&~ ~&180992&~ = dictStrip(word);
				~&5972376&~ (~&180992&~.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) {
					~&7083121450889&~;
				}
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken = ~&6504254477&~.dictWikiToken + 1;
				~&6504254477&~.dictWord = ~&180992&~;
					~&6504254477&~.dictRaw = ("" + word).~&6504329413&~();
					dictLoadTransConfig();
				~&197102514&~ dres = {};
				~&197102514&~ dfirst = "";
				~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ dli = 0; dli < ~&6504254477&~.dictLangs.~&7082886407723&~; dli++) {
					~&197102514&~ dlc = ~&6504254477&~.dictLangs[dli];
					~&197102514&~ dlr = dictLookupLang(dlc, ~&180992&~);
					dres[dlc] = dlr;
					~&5972376&~ (dlr && dfirst === "") {
						dfirst = dlc;
					}
				}
				~&6504254477&~.dictResults = dres;
				~&6504254477&~.dictTab = "dict";
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiText = "";
				~&6504254477&~.dictWikiStatus = "";
				~&6504254477&~.dictActiveLang = (dfirst !== "") ? dfirst : ((~&6504254477&~.dictLangs.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) ? ~&6504254477&~.dictLangs[0] : "en");
				dictRefresh();
				~&6504254477&~.dictShown = ~&6504329801&~;
				~&197102514&~ wc = dictWordCount(~&6504254477&~.dictRaw);
				~&197102514&~ found = (dfirst !== "");
				~&5972376&~ (wc >= 5) {
					dictOpenTranslate();
				} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (wc >= 2) {
					dictOpenWiki();
				} ~&6503784146&~ ~&5972376&~ (!found) {
					dictOpenWiki();
				}
			}

			~&6502786168&~ {
				~&5972374&~: dictLayer
				~&7083038346995&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&254550477519892873&~
				~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
				~&180995&~: 1000000
				~&233748328658231&~: ~&6504254477&~.dictShown

				~&254494525842443467&~ {
					~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
					~&254542236275632405&~: { ~&5972376&~ (~&6504254477&~.dictPicker !== "") { ~&6504254477&~.dictPicker = ""; } ~&6503784146&~ { ~&6504254477&~.dictShown = ~&214625660372&~; } }
					~&254501108490678590&~ {
						~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
						~&214622605608&~: ~&"503220030291830651&~
					}
				}

				~&254501108490678590&~ {
					~&5972374&~: dictSheet

"Invalid DeepL key." : (~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus === "quota" ? "Translation quota reached — try again later." : (~&6504254477&~.dictTransStatus === "empty" ? 	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; ============================================================================================================
; 3) Settings > Dictionary page: choose translation service (MyMemory | DeepL) + enter the DeepL API key.
;    Modeled on gestik.qmd's Settings injection; distinct page index 98 (gestik uses 97) so both coexist.
; ============================================================================================================
AFFECT [[12599552112012170435]]
	TRAVERSE [[3819512207256720568]]#[[7713561876955258]]
		LOCATE BEFORE ALL
		INSERT {
			property ~&197088788&~ _dictSettingsIndex: 98
		}

		TRAVERSE ?#[[4442117794842111784]]
			LOCATE BEFORE [[6502786168]]
			INSERT {
				~&425121728314878811&~.~&452264033555071090&~ {
					~&5972374&~: dictSidebarItem
					~&6504337259&~: ~&254477762679831355&~.~&233703109346403&~.~&233740920352621&~
					~&6504315758&~: ~&8400072892861785085&~ ? ~&6504222003&~("Dictionary") : ""
					~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"7424607448732512620&~
					~&484431552542639914&~: ~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ === ~&7713561876955258&~._dictSettingsIndex
					~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
					~&495358363329399331&~: {
						~&7713561876955258&~.~&17776274328933340866&~ = ~&7713561876955258&~._dictSettingsIndex;
						~&16542060515769262500&~.~&233743626668842&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
					}
				}
			}
		END TRAVERSE

		TRAVERSE [[7081645463424]]#[[5556919789846348618]]
			REBUILD [[16021043814775702381]]
				LOCATE BEFORE STREAM / default: ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504117156&~; /
				INSERT STREAM / ~&6503700293&~ 98: ~&7083121450889&~ dictSettingsPage; /
			END REBUILD
		END TRAVERSE

		LOCATE AFTER [[254480451320573660]]#[[6503884114]]
		INSERT {
			~&254480451320573660&~ {
				~&5972374&~: dictSettingsPage
				~&6502786168&~ {
					~&5972374&~: _dset
					~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
					readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ configPath: "file:///home/root/.config/dictionary-wiki-translator.json"
					property ~&7083178290016&~ ~&233744297001338&~: "mymemory"
					property ~&7083178290016&~ deeplKey: ""
					property ~&197102514&~ dictLangs: ["en", ~&"5972390&~]
					property ~&197102514&~ installed: ({})
					property ~&7083178290016&~ dlStatus: ""
					readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ dlBaseUrl: "https://github.com/alefaraci/xovi-qmd-extensions/releases/download/dictionary-data/"
					readonly property ~&197102514&~ dlSums: ({
						"en": "b59c1c05a9d617cecf40313881bbdda604c251644e696701537c84644d758402",
						~&"5972390&~: "4bb0931622a38b20c295aeca47d5350942b49851a804badc3679b0b18e0a4744",
						"es": "f617cd893265fb955206aedf3accb5ee2c46d24313b179d696e3b23a146906e0",
						"fr": "fe542f83e0ab036c492c66bb50fed219c925c8629022747f3e09a12cc5da9332",
						~&"5972621&~: "9f4df4e254b85301fb554650806bca3f1b97a57118fd66c2b964fa250145de44",
						"nl": "24c1001ba9b4276599f5375ce074bdb25b70aac4dd239faf824946edefea3e89",
						"de": "76d09fa7243d26ca601a06d7f0f3a5e901eeccbd3b9669199d88809c2e294238",
						"pl": "5e87eee10949f1fc133cfa717617adbbd1f9fd791f18262b537158903bfd65b9",
						"ru": "91e41453440f31c5c9f4063cff9bad0a0de97175c342c8ffd4effeb35b692ad4",
						"el": "bd70825bbc9050dd70e98b0d2ac58000eaa80b0c7e965ff95f1c407c534f56d0",
						"cs": "7b654b4c3527bd306ff873f3ecbd46492c47ac0f2ac477719ddb35e9ee6d678e",
						"tr": "3161a5dcd71880b26cea478b207bfdd9d0e1ff629265fb1847170c46d6ca65c0"
					})
					readonly property ~&197088788&~ _ctlH: 80
					property ~&197088788&~ dlPct: 0
					property ~&6504243117&~ dlTotal: 0
					property ~&7083178290016&~ dlCurLang: ""
					property ~&197102514&~ dlQueue: []
					property ~&197088788&~ dlPos: 0
				
					~&254480451320573660&~.~&495334332051582499&~: { loadConfig(); checkInstalled(); }

					~&214604601930&~ {
						~&5972374&~: dlPollTimer
						~&7713147298280334&~: 700
						~&7083121289162&~: ~&6504329801&~
						~&495358363329399331&~: _dset.dlPoll()
					}
					~&214604601930&~ {
						~&5972374&~: _dlDoneTimer
						~&7713147298280334&~: 3500
						~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
						~&495358363329399331&~: { ~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlStatus === ~&"6503751311&~) { _dset.dlStatus = ""; } }
					}

					~&214604601930&~ {
						~&5972374&~: _kbRevealTimer
						~&7713147298280334&~: 280
						~&7083121289162&~: ~&214625660372&~
						~&495358363329399331&~: _dset._kbReveal()
					}
					~&428051690305612204&~ {
						~&7083194890448&~: ~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~
						function onKeyboardRectangleChanged() { _dset._kbReveal(); }
					}
				
					function _kbReveal() {
						~&5972376&~ (!_keyInput.~&473450369389093477&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
						~&5972376&~ (~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&12597718284824111823&~.~&7082729686082&~ <= 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
						~&5972376&~ (_scroll.~&7712892661591613&~ === ~&254550717068498203&~) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
						~&197102514&~ pb = _keyHelp.~&254538926601637369&~(_scroll, 0, 0).~&180994&~ + _keyHelp.~&7082729686082&~;
						_scroll.~&7712892661591613&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&197092719&~(0, _scroll.~&7712892661591613&~ + pb - (_scroll.~&7082729686082&~ - 16));
					}
					function loadConfig() {
						~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
						req.~&6504147419&~("GET", configPath);
						req.onreadystatechange = function() {
							~&5972376&~ (req.readyState !== XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
								~&7083121450889&~;
							}
							try {
								~&197102514&~ ~&180984&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(req.responseText);
								~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~ && ~&180984&~.translateService === "deepl") {
									_dset.~&233744297001338&~ = "deepl";
								}
								~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~ && ~&180984&~.deeplKey) {
									_dset.deeplKey = "" + ~&180984&~.deeplKey;
								}
								~&5972376&~ (~&180984&~ && ~&180984&~.dictLangs && ~&180984&~.dictLangs.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
									_dset.dictLangs = ~&180984&~.dictLangs;
								}
							} catch (~&180974&~) {
							}
						};
						req.~&6504279475&~();
					}
					function saveConfig() {
						~&197102514&~ cfg = { "version": 1, "translateService": _dset.~&233744297001338&~, "deeplKey": _dset.deeplKey, "dictLangs": _dset.dictLangs };
						~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
						req.~&6504147419&~("PUT", configPath);
						req.~&6504279475&~(~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(cfg, ~&6504117156&~, 2));
					}
					function setService(~&180988&~) {
						_dset.~&233744297001338&~ = ~&180988&~;
						saveConfig();
					}
					function setKey(~&180980&~) {
						_dset.deeplKey = ("" + ~&180980&~).~&6504329413&~();
						saveConfig();
					}
					function dictLangList() {
						~&7083121450889&~ [
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "en", ~&"6504095402&~: "English" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: ~&"5972390&~, ~&"6504095402&~: "Italian" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "es", ~&"6504095402&~: "Spanish" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "fr", ~&"6504095402&~: "French" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: ~&"5972621&~, ~&"6504095402&~: "Portuguese" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "nl", ~&"6504095402&~: "Dutch" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "de", ~&"6504095402&~: "German" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "pl", ~&"6504095402&~: "Polish" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "ru", ~&"6504095402&~: "Russian" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "el", ~&"6504095402&~: "Greek" },
							{ ~&"6503715044&~: "cs", ~&"6504095402&~: "Czech" },
					{ ~&"6503715044&~: "tr", ~&"6504095402&~: "Turkish" }
						];
					}
					function dictLangGrid() {
						~&197102514&~ ~&6504032453&~ = dictLangList().~&214641468857&~();
						~&6504032453&~.~&6504290513&~(function(~&180970&~, ~&180971&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&180970&~.~&6504095402&~ < ~&180971&~.~&6504095402&~ ? -1 : (~&180970&~.~&6504095402&~ > ~&180971&~.~&6504095402&~ ? 1 : 0); });
						~&197102514&~ ~&180940&~ = 3;
						~&197102514&~ R = ~&6502909715&~.~&6503704326&~(~&6504032453&~.~&7082886407723&~ / ~&180940&~);
						~&197102514&~ out = [];
						~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180987&~ = 0; ~&180987&~ < R; ~&180987&~++) {
							~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180972&~ = 0; ~&180972&~ < ~&180940&~; ~&180972&~++) {
								~&197102514&~ ~&180980&~ = ~&180972&~ * R + ~&180987&~;
								~&5972376&~ (~&180980&~ < ~&6504032453&~.~&7082886407723&~) {
									out.~&6504189257&~(~&6504032453&~[~&180980&~]);
								}
							}
						}
						~&7083121450889&~ out;
					}
					function ~&8399623033206867694&~(~&6503715044&~) {
						~&7083121450889&~ _dset.dictLangs.~&233731717342038&~(~&6503715044&~) >= 0;
					}
					function toggleLang(~&6503715044&~) {
						~&197102514&~ ~&197080206&~ = _dset.dictLangs.~&214641468857&~();
						~&197102514&~ ~&197088462&~ = ~&197080206&~.~&233731717342038&~(~&6503715044&~);
						~&5972376&~ (~&197088462&~ >= 0) {
							~&197080206&~.~&7083173330345&~(~&197088462&~, 1);
						} ~&6503784146&~ {
							~&5972376&~ (~&197080206&~.~&7082886407723&~ >= 3) {
								~&7083121450889&~;
							}
							~&197080206&~.~&6504189257&~(~&6503715044&~);
						}
						_dset.dictLangs = ~&197080206&~;
						saveConfig();
					}
					function checkInstalled() {
						~&197102514&~ inst = {};
						~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = _dset.dictLangList();
						~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&180989&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
							~&197102514&~ ~&180972&~ = ~&180989&~[~&180978&~].~&6503715044&~;
							~&197102514&~ ~&5972579&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
							try {
								~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
								req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///home/root/dictionary/" + ~&180972&~ + "/manifest.json", ~&214625660372&~);
								req.~&6504279475&~();
								~&5972376&~ (req.responseText && req.responseText.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
									~&5972579&~ = ~&6504329801&~;
								}
							} catch (~&180974&~) {
							}
							inst[~&180972&~] = ~&5972579&~;
						}
						_dset.installed = inst;
					}
					function pendingCount() {
						~&197102514&~ n = 0;
						~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < _dset.dictLangs.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
							~&5972376&~ (!_dset.installed[_dset.dictLangs[~&180978&~]]) {
								n++;
							}
						}
						~&7083121450889&~ n;
					}
					function dsetLangName(~&6503715044&~) {
						~&197102514&~ l = dictLangList();
						~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < l.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
							~&5972376&~ (l[~&180978&~].~&6503715044&~ === ~&6503715044&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ l[~&180978&~].~&6504095402&~; }
						}
						~&7083121450889&~ ~&6503715044&~;
					}
					function dlLabel() {
						~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlStatus === ~&"478606463984084959&~) {
							~&197102514&~ nm = _dset.dsetLangName(_dset.dlCurLang);
							~&197102514&~ ~&6504295525&~ = (_dset.dlQueue.~&7082886407723&~ > 1) ? (" (" + (_dset.dlPos + 1) + ~&"180920&~ + _dset.dlQueue.~&7082886407723&~ + ~&"180914&~) : "";
							~&197102514&~ amt = (_dset.dlTotal > 0) ? (~&"180905&~ + _dset.dlPct + ~&"180910&~) : ((_dset.dlPct > 0) ? (~&"180905&~ + _dset.dlPct + " MB") : "\u2026");
							~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504222003&~("Downloading ") + nm + ~&6504295525&~ + amt;
						}
						~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlStatus === ~&"6503751311&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504222003&~("Download complete."); }
						~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlStatus === ~&"7082646676942&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504222003&~("Download failed \u2014 check WiFi, or the file failed verification."); }
						~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlStatus === "noexec") { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504222003&~("Requires the qt-command-executor module."); }
						~&7083121450889&~ "";
					}
					function startDownload() {
						~&197102514&~ todo = [];
						~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < _dset.dictLangs.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
							~&197102514&~ ~&180972&~ = _dset.dictLangs[~&180978&~];
							~&5972376&~ (!_dset.installed[~&180972&~]) { todo.~&6504189257&~(~&180972&~); }
						}
						~&5972376&~ (todo.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) { ~&7083121450889&~; }
						~&197102514&~ probe = ~&6504117156&~;
						try { probe = ~&5971598&~.createQmlObject("import net.asivery.CommandExecutor 1.0; AsyncCommandExecutor {}", _dset); }
						catch (~&180974&~) { _dset.dlStatus = "noexec"; ~&7083121450889&~; }
						~&5972376&~ (probe) { probe.~&233724926106067&~(); }
						_dset.dlQueue = todo;
						_dset.dlPos = 0;
						_dset.dlStatus = ~&"478606463984084959&~;
						_dset.dlNext();
					}
					function dlNext() {
						~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlPos >= _dset.dlQueue.~&7082886407723&~) {
							dlPollTimer.~&6504295855&~();
							_dset.checkInstalled();
							_dset.dlStatus = (_dset.pendingCount() === 0) ? ~&"6503751311&~ : ~&"7082646676942&~;
							~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlStatus === ~&"6503751311&~) { _dlDoneTimer.~&233743006639214&~(); }
							~&7083121450889&~;
						}
						~&197102514&~ lang = _dset.dlQueue[_dset.dlPos];
						_dset.dlCurLang = lang;
						_dset.dlPct = 0;
						_dset.dlTotal = 0;
						~&197102514&~ ~&197101980&~ = _dset.dlBaseUrl + lang + ".tar.gz";
						~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
						req.onreadystatechange = function() {
							~&5972376&~ (req.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
								~&197102514&~ ~&180989&~ = ~&7713428776113935&~(req.getResponseHeader("Content-Length"));
								_dset.dlTotal = (~&180989&~ > 0) ? ~&180989&~ : 0;
								_dset.dlStartOne(lang);
							}
						};
						try { req.~&6504147419&~("HEAD", ~&197101980&~); req.~&6504279475&~(); }
						catch (~&180974&~) { _dset.dlStartOne(lang); }
					}
					function dlStartOne(lang) {
						~&197102514&~ exec = ~&6504117156&~;
						try { exec = ~&5971598&~.createQmlObject("import net.asivery.CommandExecutor 1.0; AsyncCommandExecutor {}", _dset); }
						catch (~&180974&~) { _dset.dlStatus = "noexec"; dlPollTimer.~&6504295855&~(); ~&7083121450889&~; }
						~&197102514&~ pf = "/tmp/dictdl.pct";
						~&197102514&~ tf = "/tmp/" + lang + ".tgz";
						~&197102514&~ dir = "/home/root/dictionary/" + lang;
						~&197102514&~ sum = _dset.dlSums[lang] ? _dset.dlSums[lang] : "";
						~&197102514&~ xt = sum ? ("case $(sha256sum " + tf + ") in " + sum + "*) tar -xzf " + tf + " -C " + dir + " ;; esac") : ("tar -xzf " + tf + " -C " + dir);
						~&197102514&~ ~&7083158129438&~ = "rm -f " + pf + "; mkdir -p " + dir + "; wget -qO " + tf + ~&"180905&~ + _dset.dlBaseUrl + lang + ".tar.gz & W=$!; while kill -0 $W 2>/dev/null; do wc -c " + tf + " 2>/dev/null > " + pf + " || true; sleep 1; done; wait $W && " + xt + "; rm -f " + tf + ~&"180905&~ + pf;
						exec.command = "/bin/sh";
						exec.arguments = ["-c", ~&7083158129438&~];
						exec.runningChanged.~&233724019832243&~(function() {
							~&5972376&~ (!exec.~&233743626668842&~) {
								_dset.dlPct = 100;
								_dset.dlPos = _dset.dlPos + 1;
								_dset.dlNext();
							}
						});
						dlPollTimer.~&233743006639214&~();
						exec.startCommand(1800000);
					}
					function dlPoll() {
						~&197102514&~ req = new XMLHttpRequest();
						req.onreadystatechange = function() {
							~&5972376&~ (req.readyState === XMLHttpRequest.DONE) {
								~&197102514&~ ~&180988&~ = ~&7713428776113935&~(req.responseText);
								~&5972376&~ (!~&214629831714&~(~&180988&~)) {
									~&5972376&~ (_dset.dlTotal > 0) {
										~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = ~&6502909715&~.~&214626058827&~(~&180988&~ * 100 / _dset.dlTotal);
										_dset.dlPct = (~&180985&~ < 0) ? 0 : ((~&180985&~ > 100) ? 100 : ~&180985&~);
									} ~&6503784146&~ {
										_dset.dlPct = ~&6502909715&~.~&214626058827&~(~&180988&~ / 1048576);
									}
								}
							}
						};
						try { req.~&6504147419&~("GET", "file:///tmp/dictdl.pct"); req.~&6504279475&~(); }
						catch (~&180974&~) { }
					}

						~&5972374&~: _scroll

								~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
								~&7081629735527&~.~&254549367831075482&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748750575870&~
								~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Translation service")
							}
							~&254501558939456351&~ {
								~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
								~&233744706647566&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&7082925185962&~
								~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
									~&6504337259&~: _dset.~&233744297001338&~ === "mymemory" ? ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&233740920352621&~ : ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
									~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("MyMemory")
									~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
									~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 1
									~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: _dset._ctlH
									~&254542236275632405&~: _dset.setService("mymemory")
								}
								~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081261925573&~ {
									~&6504337259&~: _dset.~&233744297001338&~ === "deepl" ? ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&233740920352621&~ : ~&254477762679831355&~.~&7081261925573&~.~&254547519794454865&~
									~&6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("DeepL")
									~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
									~&7081629735527&~.~&7797818826744279624&~: 1
									~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: _dset._ctlH
									~&254542236275632405&~: _dset.setService("deepl")
								}
							}
				
							~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~ {
								~&233748328658231&~: _dset.~&233744297001338&~ === "deepl"
								~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
								~&7081629735527&~.~&254549367831075482&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7082020628281&~.~&7713442318223278&~.~&233744706647566&~.~&233748750575870&~
								~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("API Key")
							}
							~&6502786168&~ {
								~&5972374&~: _keyRow
								~&233748328658231&~: _dset.~&233744297001338&~ === "deepl"
								~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
								~&7081629735527&~.~&17520348323745447649&~: _dset._ctlH
								property ~&6503679477&~ showKey: ~&214625660372&~
								~&13733777459642361598&~: {
									~&5972376&~ (!~&233748328658231&~) {
										showKey = ~&214625660372&~;
									}
								}
								~&254503948400290430&~ {
									~&5972374&~: _keyInput
									~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
									~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: eyeBtn.~&6504027668&~
									~&233721384511543&~.~&499747351624466981&~: 16
									~&233721384511543&~.~&197100796&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&197100796&~
									~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
									~&233721384511543&~.~&15692798426932296956&~: 6
									~&6014474628714890946&~: ~&254503948400290430&~.~&14019785292674113803&~
									~&6503711953&~: ~&6504329801&~
									~&5038302442045160431&~: ~&6504329801&~
									~&13675943803964766956&~: { ~&5972376&~ (~&473450369389093477&~) { _kbRevealTimer.~&233743006639214&~(); } }
									~&7712962159258061&~: (_keyRow.showKey || _keyInput.~&473450369389093477&~) ? ~&254503948400290430&~.~&7081724354802&~ : ~&254503948400290430&~.~&7712065025762428&~
									~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 30
									~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
									~&6504315758&~: _dset.deeplKey
									~&8399893700003527327&~: {
										_dset.setKey(_keyInput.~&6504315758&~);
										_keyInput.~&214626153769&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
									}
									onEditingFinished: _dset.setKey(_keyInput.~&6504315758&~)
								}
								~&214591687532&~ {
									~&5972374&~: eyeBtn
									~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
									~&233721384511543&~.~&3441383163516681764&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&3441383163516681764&~
									~&214646099849&~: 40
									~&7082729686082&~: 40
									~&8400082987879754261&~.~&214646099849&~: 40
									~&8400082987879754261&~.~&7082729686082&~: 40
									~&7713012679492661&~: ~&214591687532&~.~&13563680926116790904&~
									~&7083172477658&~: (_keyRow.showKey || _keyInput.~&473450369389093477&~) ? ~&"13873223703509116915&~ : ~&"5203921373578675596&~
									~&254494525842443467&~ {
										~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
										~&233721384511543&~.~&233736391113274&~: -12
										~&254542236275632405&~: _keyRow.showKey = !_keyRow.showKey
									}
								}
								~&254501108490678590&~ {
									~&233721384511543&~.~&6504027668&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&6504027668&~
									~&233721384511543&~.~&214640173127&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&214640173127&~
									~&233721384511543&~.~&7082507142622&~: ~&7083038346995&~.~&7082507142622&~
									~&7082729686082&~: 2
									~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
								}
							}
							~&6503165774&~ {
								~&5972374&~: _keyHelp
								~&233748328658231&~: _dset.~&233744297001338&~ === "deepl"
								~&7081629735527&~.~&254529418434902000&~: ~&6504329801&~
								~&8400115464594289079&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&8398605015224063459&~
								~&6504315758&~: "<i>Get a free or paid key at deepl.com/pro#api</i>"
								~&7081629735527&~.~&15692798426932296956&~: (_keyInput.~&473450369389093477&~ && ~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&12597718284824111823&~.~&7082729686082&~ > 0) ? ~&5971598&~.~&486208409901236410&~.~&12597718284824111823&~.~&7082729686082&~ : 0
								~&214622605608&~: ~&"233638824537804&~
								~&6503823200&~.~&254543497768871654&~: 24
								~&7713748390489352&~: ~&6503165774&~.~&7712381377343359&~
							}
						}
					}
				
					~&254494525842443467&~ {
						~&5972374&~: _dismiss
						~&233721384511543&~.~&6503816592&~: ~&7083038346995&~
						~&180995&~: 50
						~&233748328658231&~: _keyInput.~&473450369389093477&~
						~&233726547792244&~: _keyInput.~&473450369389093477&~
						~&254542253295368380&~: function(~&214634474738&~) {
							~&197102514&~ pr = _dismiss.~&254538926601637369&~(_keyRow, ~&214634474738&~.~&180993&~, ~&214634474738&~.~&180994&~);
							~&5972376&~ (pr.~&180993&~ >= 0 && pr.~&180994&~ >= 0 && pr.~&180993&~ <= _keyRow.~&214646099849&~ && pr.~&180994&~ <= _keyRow.~&7082729686082&~) {
								~&197102514&~ lp = _dismiss.~&254538926601637369&~(_keyInput, ~&214634474738&~.~&180993&~, ~&214634474738&~.~&180994&~);
								_keyInput.~&17377324922272501788&~ = _keyInput.positionAt(lp.~&180993&~, lp.~&180994&~);
							} ~&6503784146&~ {
								_keyInput.~&214626153769&~ = ~&214625660372&~;
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

; ============================================================================================================
; 4) DocumentView: hide the zoom indicator (zoomButton) while the dictionary panel is open — but ONLY when the pen
;    toolbar is docked at the TOP. The badge is TOP-anchored for a Left/Right/Bottom toolbar (never reaches the bottom
;    sheet), but a State re-anchors it to the BOTTOM when the toolbar is at Top -> only THERE does it overlap the panel.
;    It lives in DocumentView.qml, a sibling layer ABOVE the DeviceSceneView uiOverlay, so it always paints over the panel
;    no matter how high the panel's z is (parent stacking wins) — z can't fix it. So gate its own visibility: AND the
;    original binding with !(sceneView.dictShown && toolbar at Top). sceneView = this DeviceSceneView instance; dictShown
;    drives the panel. Original binding preserved, only gated.
;    NOTE: do NOT also install hideZoomIndicator.qmd — it REPLACEs the same zoomButton.visible node, and two
;    REPLACEs on one node yield malformed QML at load -> xochitl crash-loops. This mod supersedes it here.
; ============================================================================================================
AFFECT [[1224665461898798997]]
	TRAVERSE ?#[[8400407604831274538]]
		REPLACE [[233748328658231]] WITH {
			~&233748328658231&~: (~&254557806218294214&~ !== ~&15777890623490054006&~ && !~&13256744444928358179&~.~&233748328658231&~
				|| ~&1945245929339858066&~.~&233748328658231&~
				|| (~&254547437090201330&~.~&13501484030617440462&~ && !~&233745975898428&~.~&7712989577739634&~ && ~&233725063921183&~))
				&& !(~&254547437090201330&~.dictShown && ~&233745975898428&~.~&7713446884515614&~ === ~&8236974744924391272&~.~&7712083094340350&~.~&197065948&~)
		}
	END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
